steps.name: Database Specification & System Architecture
steps.description: Establish the database schema, entity-relationship model, and project architecture guidelines in SPECIFICATION.md, roadmap.json, and instructions.json.

steps.name: Project Scaffolding & Routing Setup
steps.description: Initialize the React (Vite) + Tailwind CSS project with PWA capabilities. Configure separate routing and directories for Landlord and Tenant portals to strictly enforce view separation.
deliverables: React Router integration with role-based routes

steps.name: Tenant Portal Development
steps.description: Build the Tenant Dashboard and associated views. Implement modules for viewing active rental terms, tracking meter readings, reviewing and downloading invoices, and messaging the landlord.

steps.name: Landlord Portal Development
steps.description: Build the Landlord Dashboard. Create administrative views for property management, invoice generation, checking meter logs, registering new tenants, and responding to tenant messages.

steps.name: State Management & LocalStorage Engine
steps.description: Implement the data access layer (DAL) utilizing LocalStorage. Prepopulate mock data for quick testing and provide utility functions to simulate relational queries and updates.
deliverables: Unified data providers / custom hooks for state sync

steps.name: PWA Optimization, Styling Polish & Final Verification
steps.description: Complete service worker caching, manifest configuration, responsive design optimization, premium glassmorphic/vibrant styling polish, and end-to-end user scenario testing.
